archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Academic Structure (Teen Pacific Academic)

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-gray-200 transition-all
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: bg-white rounded-xl p-5 border border-gray-100 shadow-sm

components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn customized with soft gray borders, DM Sans font, rounded-xl
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: bg-[#F05A4A] text-white hover:bg-[#E63946]. Secondary: bg-[#0B2545] text-white hover:bg-[#133C55].
components_strategy.badges: Youthful pastel backgrounds with dark academic text, e.g., bg-blue-100 text-[#0B2545] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold

hero_background.description: Energetic construction worker, good for hero section overlay.

category_carpenter.description: Carpenter working with wood in workshop.

general_handyman.description: Smiling bald man with a red power drill, friendly and approachable.

testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='category-plumber-card').
instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for the marketing/landing page. Avoid Vercel/Stripe generic looks. Use aggressive asymmetry for the hero.

For the booking, dashboard, and admin pages, use Shadcn UI customized to match the 'teen pacific academic' aesthetic. Use flat, rectangular, but slightly rounded (rounded-2xl) cards with crisp borders.
Use Outfit for Headings and DM Sans for Body. Add tracking-tight to H1/H2.
Do not use teal green (#1B93A4) for anything.
Use Sunset Coral (#F05A4A) for CTAs to break the Academic Navy (#0B2545) dominance and bring the 'teen' vibe.
Header must be sticky with Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/85). Ensure navigation links are visible on desktop.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and clickable cards have hover:bg and hover:-translate-y-1 as defined in the motion guidelines.
For frontend files, you MUST write .js or .jsx (not .tsx) as configured in the setup.
